prompt: Create a photorealistic lifestyle portrait of an adult young East Asian woman lying on a bed in soft morning sunlight, viewed from a slightly elevated overhead angle like an intimate candid smartphone photo. She has short layered blonde hair with wispy bangs, fair skin, minimal natural makeup, and a calm thoughtful expression while gazing off to the side. Her right hand rests lightly near her lips and chin, and her left arm is bent above her head on the pillow. She wears a simple plain slightly wrinkled white T-shirt. The setting is a bright minimalist bedroom with exactly 2 white pillows, white bedding, and a sunlit window on the right with sheer white curtains; warm light creates realistic highlights on her hair, face, arm, and shirt, with gentle shadows and soft fabric texture. Use a close crop from head to mid-torso, natural skin detail, shallow depth of field, subtle lens distortion, realistic color grading, no visible text, no jewelry, no exaggerated posing, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic lifestyle portrait of an adult young East Asian woman lying on a bed in soft morning sunlight, viewed from a slightly elevated overhead angle like an intimate candid smartphone photo. She has short layered blonde hair with wispy bangs, fair skin, minimal natural makeup, and a calm thoughtful expression while gazing off to the side. Her right hand rests lightly near her lips and chin, and her left arm is bent above her head on the pillow. She wears a simple plain slightly wrinkled white T-shirt. The setting is a bright minimalist bedroom with exactly 2 white pillows, white bedding, and a sunlit window on the right with sheer white curtains; warm light creates realistic highlights on her hair, face, arm, and shirt, with gentle shadows and soft fabric texture. Use a close crop from head to mid-torso, natural skin detail, shallow depth of field, subtle lens distortion, realistic color grading, no visible text, no jewelry, no exaggerated posing, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级逼真的生活方式肖像，主角是一位 年轻东亚女性，她躺在床上，沐浴在柔和的晨光中。视角采用略微俯视的仰角，如同亲密的手机抓拍照片。她留着 带有轻薄刘海的短款层次感金发，肤色白皙，妆容自然清透，神情平静而深邃，目光望向侧方。她的右手轻搭在唇边和下巴附近，左臂弯曲枕在头部的枕头上。她身穿一件简单的 纯色微皱的白色 T 恤。场景设定在一间明亮的极简主义卧室中，配有 2 个白色枕头和白色床品，右侧窗户透入晨光，挂着白色薄纱窗帘；温暖的光线在她的头发、面部、手臂和 T 恤上营造出逼真的高光，伴有柔和的阴影和细腻的织物纹理。画面采用从头部到躯干中部的近景剪裁，呈现自然的皮肤细节、浅景深、细微的镜头畸变和真实的色彩分级，无可见文字，无首饰，无夸张姿势，无水印。
